Rows: Detecting a given face in a database of facial images

gt_sql: SELECT Title FROM posts WHERE Id = ( SELECT PostId FROM comments ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1 )

Rows: Detecting a given face in a database of facial images

pred_sql:
SELECT p.Title
FROM comments c
JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
ORDER BY c.Score DESC
LIMIT 1
question: What is the title for the post which got the highest score comment?
